description_long: This is a compact, stylized castle with four tall, square corner towers, each topped with a red flag. The walls are a pale, sandy stone color and feature prominent battlements along the top edges, giving the structure a fortified appearance. The main entrance is an arched gateway, visible on one side, leading into an open central courtyard. The flags are mounted on wooden poles and add a touch of color and heraldic flair to the otherwise monochrome stonework. The castle's design is simple and geometric, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation, evoking a classic medieval or fantasy style. The structure appears hollow inside, with ample space for agents to enter and move within the courtyard.
description: A stylized, pale stone castle with four battlemented towers, red flags, and an arched entrance leading to an open courtyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing three towers with battlements and two red flags, with the open courtyard visible inside.
description_view_1: View of the main arched entrance, flanked by two towers with battlements and red flags, providing a clear look into the courtyard.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back towers and battlements, with all four red flags visible and no entrance on this side.
description_view_3: Side view showing the solid walls, battlements, and three visible red flags, with the courtyard partially visible.
